description: PROJECT DESCRIPTION: BUILDING 'B' OF THE ODYSSEY HOUSE LOUISIANA CAMPUS LOCATED AT 1125 N. TONTI STREET, NEW ORLEANS IS APPROXIMATELY 6,723 SF WITHIN A TWO-STORY WOOD STRUCTURE. THE ORIGINAL STRUCTURE DATES TO THE MID-1860'S, AND INCLUDED RESIDENTIAL SLEEPING QUARTERS AND A CHAPEL. IT'S CURRENT USE INCLUDES A DEFUNCT KITCHEN, MEETING ROOMS AND OFFICES. THE SCOPE OF WORK FOR THE PROJECT IS TO REDEVELOP THE FIRST FLOOR WITH A NEW KITCHEN (INCLUDING AN EXPANSION OF THE KITCHEN), FIRST FLOOR OFFICES, SECOND FLOOR SLEEPING ROOMS (WITH A MAXIMUM OF 4 BEDS PER ROOM.
